title: arabis collina subsp. muricola
intro: Arabis collina subsp. muricola, a subspecies of the Arabis collina plant, is a type of flowering plant in the family Brassicaceae. It is a perennial herb with medicinal properties, traditionally used to treat various health conditions due to its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties. The plant is known for its health benefits, including its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and act as an expectorant to relieve coughs. Arabis collina subsp. muricola is typically prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
